---
name: Feature request
description: Propose a new detector, scenario, report, figure, or manuscript improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

Describe the proposed feature.

## Motivation

Why is this useful for the lab, manuscript, or release process?

## Proposed implementation

Describe the expected files, classes, functions, tests, or docs.

## Affected area

- [ ] telemetry generation
- [ ] detector scoring
- [ ] timeline scoring
- [ ] metrics/reporting
- [ ] figure generation
- [ ] detection rules
- [ ] manuscript/docs
- [ ] release workflow

## Expected result impact

Will this change published tables, intervention windows, or expected results?

- [ ] No
- [ ] Yes, expected-result tests must be updated

## Safety boundary

Confirm the feature remains synthetic-only and defensive.

- [ ] Synthetic-only
- [ ] Defensive purpose
- [ ] No credential collection
- [ ] No live targeting
- [ ] No exploit or malware content
